title: Determining Power and RMS Value
summary: Example 1.2 demonstrates how to calculate signal power and RMS values for sinusoidal and complex exponential signals. Part (a) shows that a sinusoid of amplitude C has power C²/2 and RMS value C/√2 regardless of frequency or phase. Part (b) begins the analysis of the sum of two sinusoids with different frequencies, using time-averaging over an infinite interval.
